summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The NYLI Investment Grade CLO ETF (CLOO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests primarily in investment grade collateralized loan obligations (CLOs). The fund seeks capital preservation and current income through diversified exposure to higher-quality CLO tranches. CLOO was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by New York Life Investments.

data.title: New York Life Investment Management Debuts Investment Grade CLO ETF, Expanding Access to High-Quality Income
